title: MapIntent
description: Engine-neutral statement of what a map should be and why, authored or approved by canon before any generation runs. Equivalent in role to the existing Map Blueprint's map_intent/biome/dimensions header (atlas-tools/mapgen/blueprint_schema.md), formalized as a standalone versioned artifact so archetype selection can be recorded before a MapPlan exists.

atlas_screen_id.description: Canonical Atlas screen this intent targets. Null for a not-yet-canonized prototype intent.

archetype_ref.description: Which BuildingArchetype this intent wants realized. Null for non-building intents (overworld, dungeon-only, etc.) that this contract version does not yet cover.

generation_seed_salt.description: Map-specific stable salt consumed by GenerationManifest's seed derivation. Null for handcrafted intents with no procedural component.
